class.name: EncapsuledData
class.brief_description: Helper class that [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b] uses to encapsulate data while also updating labels in the editor UI.
class.description: Helper class that [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b] uses to encapsulate data while also updating labels in the editor UI. "Encapsuled" is a typo, should've been "Encapsulated". Only supports: [b]int[/b], [b]float[/b] and [b]bool[/b].

method.name: set
method.description: Setter for the encapsulated data. This also calls [b]set_label_value[/b] if a [b]SliderContainer[/b] is connected to it through UI.

method.name: connect_slider
method.description: Connects a [b]SliderContainer[/b] UI container to the [b]EncapsuledData[/b], which allows it to call [b]set_label_value[/b] in the setter.
